services.title: NetBird ZTNA
services.description: Self-hosted ZTNA control plane for private admin access.

requiredValues.label: NetBird public hostname
requiredValues.description: Public hostname for the NetBird control plane, for example ztna.loftrop.com.

requiredValues.label: NetBird Keycloak OIDC client secret
requiredValues.description: Client secret for the Keycloak OIDC client used by NetBird.

services.title: Logging Admin Plane
services.description: Grafana/Loki logging panel and log ingestion config.

requiredValues.label: Grafana private admin hostname
requiredValues.description: ZTNA/private hostname for the Grafana logging UI, for example logs.admin.loftrop.com.

requiredValues.label: Initial Grafana admin password
requiredValues.description: Generated or human-provided password used only during first Grafana bootstrap.
